headline: A Look At Cintas (CTAS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Cintas stock overview after recent performance shift Cintas (CTAS) has attracted attention after a recent period where the share price showed a negative move over the month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess how its fundamentals stack up. With a market value of about US$69.99b and annual revenue of US$11.03b, the company sits firmly in large cap territory, which often appeals to investors looking for scale and diversified operations.
